name: pwa-update-recovery
title: PWA update recovery
description: Prove and improve old-to-new Service Worker activation, user-controlled reload, offline fallback, and browser-data preservation.
scope: Service Worker update lifecycle, accessible refresh prompt, pre-reload persistence, deterministic old-to-new browser upgrade testing, and PWA quality contracts.
notes: Do not push or deploy. The old Worker is a test-only fixture and must never enter the Pages artifact.
